mapper.sql: p.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_tender_version tv ON tv.lot_id = l.lot_id AND tv.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tv.current_flag = 1 AND tv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE l.project_id = p.project_id AND l.status = 'BIDDING' AND l.deleted_flag = 0 )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.procurement_mode, p.budget_amount, p.publish_time, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_tender_version tv ON tv.lot_id = l.lot_id AND tv.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tv.current_flag = 1 AND tv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE l.project_id = p.project_id AND l.status = 'BIDDING' AND l.deleted_flag = 0 ) AS lot_count FROM t_bid_project p
AND ( p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryForm.keyword}, '%') OR p.project_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryForm.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC, p.project_id DESC
SELECT p.project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.project_type, p.procurement_mode, p.budget_amount, p.publish_time FROM t_bid_project p WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND LIMIT 1

SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, l.lot_scope, l.registration_start_time, l.registration_end_time, l.bid_start_time, l.bid_end_time, tv.tender_version_id, tv.version_no AS tender_version_no, tv.summary AS tender_summary FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_tender_version tv ON tv.lot_id = l.lot_id AND tv.status = 'ACTIVE' AND tv.current_flag = 1 AND tv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE l.project_id = #{projectId} AND l.status = 'BIDDING' AND l.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY l.lot_no ASC, l.lot_id ASC

SELECT r.registration_id, r.project_id, p.project_name, r.lot_id, l.lot_name, r.supplier_name_snapshot, r.supplier_credit_code, r.status, r.submit_time, r.qualified_time, r.reject_reason, r.cancel_reason, r.version FROM t_bid_registration r INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = r.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = r.lot_id WHERE r.registration_id = #{registrationId} AND r.supplier_credit_code = #{supplierCreditCode} AND r.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT s.submission_id, sv.submission_version_id AS latest_submission_version_id, s.registration_id, s.project_id, p.project_name, s.lot_id, l.lot_name, s.supplier_name_snapshot, s.supplier_credit_code, s.status, s.latest_version_no, s.latest_submit_time, s.receipt_no, sv.price_amount, sv.contact_name, sv.contact_phone, s.withdraw_reason, s.version FROM t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = s.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = s.lot_id LEFT JOIN t_bid_submission_version sv ON sv.submission_id = s.submission_id AND sv.version_no = s.latest_version_no AND sv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE s.submission_id = #{submissionId} AND s.supplier_credit_code = #{supplierCreditCode} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT l.lot_id, l.project_id, p.project_name, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, a.status AS award_status, CASE WHEN a.award_id IS NOT NULL AND a.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS result_visible, CASE WHEN a.winner_credit_code = #{supplierCreditCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS winner_flag, a.award_amount, a.public_notice_time, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM t_bid_submission s WHERE s.lot_id = l.lot_id AND s.supplier_credit_code = #{supplierCreditCode} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS participated_flag FROM t_bid_lot l INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = l.project_id LEFT JOIN t_bid_award a ON a.lot_id = l.lot_id AND a.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND a.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE l.lot_id = #{lotId} AND l.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
